command.description: Filter, jump to, rename or reset Niri workspaces

renamePrompt.name: Type a new name for Workspace {idx}
renamePrompt.description: Press Enter to apply. Type {sigil}{sigil} to reset.

resetPrompt.name: Reset name of {target}
resetPrompt.description: Clears the custom name — press Enter to apply

applyRename.name: Set name: {name}
applyRename.unchangedDescription: Name is already set — press Enter to close

noMatches.name: No workspaces match "{filter}"
noMatches.description: Try a different filter or clear it

noHighlighted.name: No workspace to edit
noHighlighted.description: Highlight a workspace in the list, or open the launcher on Niri

notNiri.name: Not running on Niri
notNiri.description: This plugin only works on the Niri compositor
